description.overview: Known as PON in Poland, this shaggy herding dog is confident and clever. They're excellent watchdogs and loyal family companions.
description.history: The Polish Lowland Sheepdog originated in Poland.
description.temperament: Known for being confident, clever, perceptive.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their long, thick, shaggy coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: Known as PON in Poland, this shaggy herding dog is confident and clever. They're excellent watchdogs and loyal family companions.
